rows.label: tlk70000072_01_msg0001
rows.name:
Macmac understand why Morumo popular.
Always supported shopping ward through
day and night, after all.

rows.label: tlk70000072_01_msg0002
rows.name:
But Macmac worry that Morumo becoming
teensy bit too powerful. And trying
too hard to be cool leader.

rows.label: tlk70000072_01_msg0003
rows.name:
Overworking make nobody happy, only
bring pain. But admitting that hard,
so often start making silly excuses.

rows.label: tlk70000072_01_msg0004
rows.name:
Macmac think people usually happier if
not being super cool. Maybe is better
to be little bit uncool actually.

rows.label: tlk70000072_01_msg0005
rows.name:
So what Morumo need right now
maybe not stacks of money.

rows.label: tlk70000072_01_msg0006
rows.name:
Me think Morumo need somebody to talk
open and honest with. Someone to give
big slap when Morumo being silly!

rows.label: tlk70000072_01_msg0101
rows.name:
What happen to Red Pollen Orbs? If
not pick up, fine, but if friends
sell after picking up, is worst!
